requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (SANS IEC 60335-2-24 + SANS IEC 60335-1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（SANS IEC 60335-2-24 + SANS IEC 60335-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（SANS IEC 60335-2-24 + SANS IEC 60335-1）

summary.en: Household refrigerators supplied in South Africa must comply with the general appliance safety standard SANS IEC 60335-1 together with the particular standard SANS IEC 60335-2-24 for refrigerating appliances, which are the South African adoptions of IEC 60335-1 and IEC 60335-2-24. These cover protection against electric shock, mechanical and thermal hazards, insulation and earthing, abnormal-operation and stability testing, component and material requirements, flammable-refrigerant construction provisions, and required markings and instructions. The product must be rated and constructed for the South African 230 V, 50 Hz supply. Safety conformity is demonstrated through test reports to SANS IEC 60335-2-24 (preferably from a SANAS/ILAC-MRA accredited laboratory; an IEC CB Scheme test report and certificate can help) and forms the core of the NRCS Letter of Authority safety dossier. Required safety markings, ratings, and user instructions must be present, in English.
summary.zh: 在南非供应的家用电冰箱须符合通用器具安全标准SANS IEC 60335-1以及制冷器具特殊标准SANS IEC 60335-2-24，二者为南非采纳的IEC 60335-1和IEC 60335-2-24。其涵盖防电击、机械和热危害防护、绝缘和接地、异常运行和稳定性试验、元件和材料要求、可燃制冷剂结构条款，以及所需标识和说明。产品须按南非230伏、50赫兹供电标定和构造。安全合格通过按SANS IEC 60335-2-24的检测报告（最好出自SANAS/ILAC-MRA认可实验室；IEC CB体系检测报告和证书有助于此）证明，并构成NRCS许可函安全档案的核心。所需安全标识、额定值和用户说明须以英文呈现。
summary.zht: 在南非供應的家用電冰箱須符合通用器具安全標準SANS IEC 60335-1以及製冷器具特殊標準SANS IEC 60335-2-24，二者為南非採納的IEC 60335-1和IEC 60335-2-24。其涵蓋防電擊、機械和熱危害防護、絕緣和接地、異常運行和穩定性試驗、元件和材料要求、可燃製冷劑結構條款，以及所需標識和說明。產品須按南非230伏、50赫茲供電標定和構造。安全合格通過按SANS IEC 60335-2-24的檢測報告（最好出自SANAS/ILAC-MRA認可實驗室；IEC CB體系檢測報告和證書有助於此）證明，並構成NRCS許可函安全檔案的核心。所需安全標識、額定值和用戶說明須以英文呈現。

standards_or_laws: SANS IEC 60335-1 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — Part 1: General requirements
SANS IEC 60335-2-24 — Particular requirements for refrigerators, food freezers and ice-makers
Compulsory Specification VC 9008 / NRCS LOA — safety evidence required before import and sale

summary.en: In China, household refrigerator electrical safety is governed by GB 4706.1 (general requirements) together with GB 4706.13 (particular requirements for refrigerating appliances), which are the Chinese adoptions of IEC 60335-1 and IEC 60335-2-24 and are part of mandatory CCC certification administered by SAMR/CNCA. CCC requires testing by a designated body plus factory inspection, and the appliance is rated for the Chinese 220 V, 50 Hz supply. Because both GB 4706.13 and SANS IEC 60335-2-24 derive from the same IEC 60335-2-24 base standard, the technical safety requirements are closely aligned and an IEC CB report can often bridge the two. However, the CCC certificate and Chinese-rated (220 V) marking are issued under Chinese law and are not accepted as conformity evidence in South Africa, where the NRCS LOA pathway applies.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用电冰箱电气安全由GB 4706.1（通用要求）和GB 4706.13（制冷器具特殊要求）规范，二者为中国采纳的IEC 60335-1和IEC 60335-2-24，属于由SAMR/CNCA管理的强制CCC认证的一部分。CCC要求由指定机构检测并进行工厂检查，器具按中国220伏、50赫兹供电标定。由于GB 4706.13和SANS IEC 60335-2-24均源自同一IEC 60335-2-24基础标准，技术安全要求高度一致，IEC CB报告常可衔接两者。但CCC证书及中国额定（220伏）标识依据中国法律签发，在南非不被接受为合格证据，当地适用NRCS许可函路径。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用電冰箱電氣安全由GB 4706.1（通用要求）和GB 4706.13（製冷器具特殊要求）規範，二者為中國採納的IEC 60335-1和IEC 60335-2-24，屬於由SAMR/CNCA管理的強制CCC認證的一部分。CCC要求由指定機構檢測並進行工廠檢查，器具按中國220伏、50赫茲供電標定。由於GB 4706.13和SANS IEC 60335-2-24均源自同一IEC 60335-2-24基礎標準，技術安全要求高度一致，IEC CB報告常可銜接兩者。但CCC證書及中國額定（220伏）標識依據中國法律簽發，在南非不被接受為合格證據，當地適用NRCS許可函路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.1 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — Part 1: General requirements (IEC 60335-1 aligned; part of CCC)
GB 4706.13 — Particular requirements for refrigerators, food freezers and ice-makers (IEC 60335-2-24 aligned; part of CCC)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — administered by SAMR/CNCA with factory inspection

gap.en: Although the safety standards are technically aligned through IEC 60335-2-24, the conformity pathway differs: (1) Certificate not recognised — a Chinese CCC certificate and GB 4706.13 report are not accepted as proof in South Africa; safety conformity must be evidenced to SANS IEC 60335-2-24 within the NRCS LOA dossier, ideally with reports from a SANAS/ILAC-MRA accredited lab or an IEC CB Scheme report plus certificate that can be transposed. (2) Rating/marking — the appliance must be rated and marked for 230 V (not the Chinese 220 V); rating plates, settings, and instructions must be revised and verified within the South African voltage band. (3) Markings and language — required safety markings, warnings, and user instructions must follow the SANS IEC 60335 clauses and be in English. Exporters who hold an IEC CB report aligned to the latest IEC 60335-2-24 edition will find the gap narrower, but the LOA evidence and South African marking are still mandatory and country-specific.
gap.zh: 尽管安全标准通过IEC 60335-2-24技术一致，合格路径仍不同：（1）证书不被承认——中国CCC证书和GB 4706.13报告在南非不被接受为证明；安全合格须在NRCS许可函档案内按SANS IEC 60335-2-24提供证据，最好出自SANAS/ILAC-MRA认可实验室的报告，或可转换的IEC CB体系报告加证书。（2）额定值／标识——器具须按230伏（非中国220伏）标定和标识；铭牌、设置和说明须修订，并在南非电压带内验证。（3）标识和语言——所需安全标识、警告和用户说明须遵循SANS IEC 60335条款并使用英文。持有对齐最新版IEC 60335-2-24的IEC CB报告的出口商，差距较小，但LOA证据和南非标识仍属强制且因国而异。
gap.zht: 儘管安全標準通過IEC 60335-2-24技術一致，合格路徑仍不同：（1）證書不被承認——中國CCC證書和GB 4706.13報告在南非不被接受為證明；安全合格須在NRCS許可函檔案內按SANS IEC 60335-2-24提供證據，最好出自SANAS/ILAC-MRA認可實驗室的報告，或可轉換的IEC CB體系報告加證書。（2）額定值／標識——器具須按230伏（非中國220伏）標定和標識；銘牌、設置和說明須修訂，並在南非電壓帶內驗證。（3）標識和語言——所需安全標識、警告和用戶說明須遵循SANS IEC 60335條款並使用英文。持有對齊最新版IEC 60335-2-24的IEC CB報告的出口商，差距較小，但LOA證據和南非標識仍屬強制且因國而異。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical safety conformity to SANS IEC 60335-1 and SANS IEC 60335-2-24 is required for the NRCS Letter of Authority before refrigerators may be imported or sold in South Africa
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4706.1 and GB 4706.13 safety compliance is part of CCC certification required before household refrigerators may be sold or imported in China

source.publisher: NRCS — National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (South Africa)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety is technically aligned through IEC 60335-2-24, but the Chinese CCC certificate and GB 4706.13 report are not accepted in South Africa. Safety conformity must be evidenced to SANS IEC 60335-2-24 (ideally via a SANAS/ILAC-MRA lab or transposable IEC CB report) within the NRCS LOA, with the appliance rated/marked for 230 V and instructions in English.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电气安全通过IEC 60335-2-24技术一致，但中国CCC证书和GB 4706.13报告在南非不被接受。安全合格须在NRCS许可函内按SANS IEC 60335-2-24提供证据（最好经SANAS/ILAC-MRA实验室或可转换的IEC CB报告），器具按230伏标定／标识，说明使用英文。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電氣安全通過IEC 60335-2-24技術一致，但中國CCC證書和GB 4706.13報告在南非不被接受。安全合格須在NRCS許可函內按SANS IEC 60335-2-24提供證據（最好經SANAS/ILAC-MRA實驗室或可轉換的IEC CB報告），器具按230伏標定／標識，說明使用英文。
